scope.dependency_radius: .dev/specs only, plus .dev entry docs if they reference the settled contract.
constraints: Decide whether .dev/specs/domains/ is active or template-only before editing wording.
non_goals: Do not create domain specs without source requirements.
Do not change test spec storage unless required by the domains contract.

review_findings: .dev/specs/SPEC-GUIDE.MD and SPEC-ORGANIZATION-GUIDE.MD describe .dev/specs/domains/ but the subtree is absent.

steps: Inspect current .dev/specs tree and references to .dev/specs/domains/.
Choose active subtree creation with README/template or rewrite guides to template-only state.
Update specs docs and dependent entry references consistently.

results.summary: Settled .dev/specs/domains/ as a target-repository convention, not an active framework subtree; added specs README and INDEX.
tests_run: active-surface referenced-path existence scan excluding archival workflow records and retired requirements
rg -n -uu "[一-龥]" over remediated .ai entry docs
targeted stale entry reference scans for removed .dev index paths
targeted README catalog scans for remediated high-level README files
